title: Type-Inferred Contracts
description: Architect systems where TypeScript types are automatically derived from runtime schemas, eliminating documentation-code drift. Implement a single source of truth for data contracts by linking runtime validation to compile-time types.
objectives: Architect systems where TypeScript types are automatically derived from runtime schemas, eliminating documentation-code drift.
Implement a single source of truth for data contracts by linking runtime validation to compile-time types.
